languages.text: "Мы — все равно что эти механизмы, ребята. Будем делать так, как велят те, кто сверху".

traits.locale_text: "Мы — все равно что эти механизмы, ребята. Будем делать так, как велят те, кто сверху".

languages.text: "We're just like these machines, lads. We'll do whatever those at the top command."
languages.original_text: "Мы — все равно что эти механизмы, ребята. Будем делать так, как велят те, кто сверху".

traits.locale_text: "We're just like these mechanisms, lads. We'll do whatever those at the top command."
"We're just like these machines, lads. We'll do whatever those at the top command."
"We're just like these mechanisms, lads. We'll do whatever those at the top decide."
"We're just like these mechanisms, lads. We'll do whatever those at the top command."
"We're just like these machines, lads. We'll do whatever those at the top command."

languages.text: “伙计们，咱们跟这些机器也没什么区别。上头让干啥，咱们就干啥。”
languages.original_text: "We're just like these machines, lads. We'll do whatever those at the top command."

traits.locale_text: “伙计们，咱们跟这些机器也没什么区别。上头让干啥，咱们就干啥。”

languages.text: «Somos iguales que estas máquinas, muchachos. Haremos lo que ordenen los de arriba».
languages.original_text: "We're just like these machines, lads. We'll do whatever those at the top command."

traits.locale_text: «Somos iguales que estas máquinas, muchachos. Haremos lo que ordenen los de arriba».

languages.text: « On est comme ces machines, les gars. On ne fait qu'exécuter les ordres. »
languages.original_text: "We're just like these machines, lads. We'll do whatever those at the top command."

traits.locale_text: « On est comme ces machines, les gars. On ne fait qu'exécuter les ordres. »

languages.text: "Biz de bu makineler gibiyiz. Yukarıdakiler ne emrederse onu yaparız."
languages.original_text: "We're just like these machines, lads. We'll do whatever those at the top command."

traits.locale_text: "Biz de bu makineler gibiyiz. Yukarıdakiler ne emrederse onu yaparız."

languages.text: "Wir sind wie diese Maschinen, Leute. Wir tun, was die da oben befehlen."
languages.original_text: "We're just like these machines, lads. We'll do whatever those at the top command."

traits.locale_text: "Wir sind wie diese Maschinen, Leute. Wir tun, was die da oben befehlen."

languages.text: 「我々は、この機械と同じだ。上層部が命じれば、我々はどんなことでもする。」
languages.original_text: "We're just like these machines, lads. We'll do whatever those at the top command."

traits.locale_text: 「我々は、この機械と同じだ。上層部が命じれば、我々はどんなことでもする。」
